title: astragalus globosus
intro: Astragalus globosus, also known as the globular milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountains of the western United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Astragalus globosus include enhanced immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and improved respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus globosus can be prepared in various forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and prevent illness.
